name: listing-lab
rationale: Etsy/Shopify sellers pay for listing help; MVP ships in 1 day; Reddit/Etsy SEO distribution.

name: etsy-tag-finder
rationale: Same buyer as ListingLab; 13-tag pain is acute; programmatic SEO + r/Etsy distribution; ships in 2 days.

name: freelance-proposal-kit
rationale: Fastest build of freelancer lane; r/Upwork reach; bundles with InvoiceForge; low API cost.

name: invoice-forge
rationale: Freelancer invoices are crowded but PDF export + agent reminders is a wedge.

name: review-reply-bot
rationale: Shopify store owners hate review responses; paste workflow ships fast but moat is weak vs ChatGPT.

name: price-watch-digest
rationale: Real pain but scraping fragility and noisy market; barely clears 24/40 kill threshold.
